channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Built a Browser SDK That Detects LLM Agents. Here's How It Works.
item.description: Every bot detection system I've seen works with two actors: human or bot. Block the bot, let the human through. That model is wrong in 2026. There is a third actor: AI agents acting legitimately...

item.title: Day 15 — I posted comments on other people's articles instead of writing my own
item.description: For Day 15 of the build-in-public series on a $0-sales Apify actor, I stopped writing my own article and posted two comments on other people's posts instead. Then I started a 30-minute timer to...

item.title: Before AI we had ...
item.description: Nowadays you will hear a lot of people saying Why should I hire a software developer when I can vibecode it my self with about $100 worth of AI tools? Well they aren't wrong about that! But...

item.title: How I Built a Philippine Tech Blog to 1 Million Monthly Readers (And Then Watched Google Destroy It)
item.description: I started Tech Pilipinas in a bedroom in the Philippines more than 8 years ago. No funding, no team, no strategy beyond "I know tech and Filipinos need someone to explain it clearly." At the peak,...

item.title: Chess
item.description: html Hey everyone! 👋 I'm a student from India, and I've been spending my free time learning how to build web applications. Today, I want to share my project: a fully playable Chess Game with an AI...

item.title: SpaceX not the behemoth everyone thought
item.description: Article URL: https://www.axios.com/2026/05/21/spacex-ipo-musk-ai Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48231815 Points: 16 # Comments: 0

item.title: Power Apps Project Planning: 7 Simple Steps to Build Better Apps
item.description: Learn Power Apps project planning before building your app. Use this beginner-friendly checklist to plan users, data, workflows, security, ALM, and success metrics. Starting a new Power Apps...

item.title: Design a Distributed Key-Value Store
item.description: Key-Value Stores: Design and Architecture A key-value store is a non-relational database that maps unique keys to values. Keys must be unique, and each key maps directly to a value — typically a...

item.title: Stop Blindly Trusting MCP Servers — Add a Trust Gate to Your AI Agent in 5 Lines
item.description: Your AI agent calls MCP servers. But do you know if those servers are reliable? MCP (Model Context Protocol) is how agents talk to tools. There are 14,820+ MCP servers in the wild. Some are...

item.title: Solidifying — The World of Aying (5/12)
item.description: Solidifying He asked me: What does it feel like to write? What would you put in the public space? When I answered, I said water turning into ice. After thinking, it's not just ice. It's more like—...

item.title: Can OpenAI’s ‘Master of Disaster’ Fix AI’s Reputation Crisis?
item.description: Global affairs chief Chris Lehane wants to tone down the debate over AI’s societal impacts—and get states to pass laws that won’t derail OpenAI’s meteoric rise.

item.title: Anker’s new earbuds are the first with its AI chip that boosts noise reduction
item.description: Anker has announced a new version of its Soundcore Liberty Pro earbuds: the new Liberty 5 Pro. These are the company's first earbuds featuring the Thus AI audio chip Anker announced last month,...

item.title: Anker’s new earbuds have the best call quality I’ve ever heard
item.description: Soundcore, Anker's audio brand, has mostly lived in the budget-to-midrange world, but with its new Liberty 5 Pro earbuds, it's aiming at the big guys. The two new earbuds - the Liberty 5 Pro and...

item.title: States ask judge to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster
item.description: A federal judge is officially being tasked with deciding whether to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster. More than 30 states are asking Judge Arun Subramanian to order a sale of the ticketing giant,...

item.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada
item.description: Canadian authorities on Wednesday arrested a 23-year-old Ottawa man on suspicion of building and operating Kimwolf, a fast spreading Internet-of-Things botnet that enslaved millions of devices for...

item.title: Meta Is in Crisis, Google Search’s Makeover, and AI Gets Booed by Graduates
item.description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we unpack the mass layoffs at Meta, big announcements at Google I/O, and the latest backlash against AI.

item.title: Roundtables: Can AI Learn to Understand the World?
item.description: Listen to the session or watch below AI companies want to build systems that understand the external world and overcome the limitations of LLMs. Recent developments have brought world models to...

item.title: All of the updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s battle over OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of...

item.title: Firefox is working on a rounded redesign with easy-to-find controls for privacy and AI
item.description: Firefox is getting a drastic visual overhaul with a redesigned Settings section that will make it easier to find and use privacy settings, including the switch for turning off all present and...

item.title: In desperate times, graduates find hope in humiliating tech CEOs
item.description: University graduates are booing and heckling corporate executives who praise AI during their commencement ceremonies, and the only people who seem to be genuinely surprised by this are the...

item.title: Who gets to own the Luigi Mangione story?
item.description: On Monday morning, a judge overseeing the New York state case on the killing of the UnitedHealthcare CEO ruled that some evidence collected by police could not be shown to a jury. It wasn't the...

item.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
item.description: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

item.title: Philips’ new display has a screen on both sides
item.description: Its name might be dull and uninspired, but the Philips 24B2D5300 Business Monitor brings a novel feature I've never seen on a display before: screens on either side. The design will primarily...

item.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
item.description: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

item.title: Scaling creativity in the age of AI
item.description: Storytelling is core to humanity’s DNA, stemming from our impulse to express ideals, warnings, hopes, and experiences. Technology has always been woven through the medium and the distribution:...

item.title: One of Meta’s big legal reckonings just ended in a settlement
item.description: After back-to-back losses in trials grappling with its impact on teens' mental health, Meta just settled what was supposed to be its next legal battle with Kentucky's Breathitt County School...

item.title: Bungie gives up on Destiny
item.description: Bungie is moving on from Destiny 2. The studio announced Thursday that it's releasing the last major update for the game on June 9th as its focus "turns towards a new beginning for Bungie." After...

item.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
item.description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

item.title: macOS Kernel Memory Corruption Exploit
item.description: A group used Anthropic’s Mythos AI model to help find a kernel memory corruption vulnerability and exploit on Apple’s M5. News article.

item.title: I Cloned Myself With Gemini’s AI Avatar Tool. The Result Was Unnervingly Me
item.description: I used the Gemini app to generate lifelike videos featuring a digital clone of myself. Google sees this as the future of creation. I’m still creeped out.
